steps.subject: Garage door vendor for your {company_name} properties?
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

I'm Tal with Goldman's Garage Door Repair. We work with several property management companies in {city} and wanted to reach out.

I know garage doors are one of those maintenance items that tenants call about at the worst possible times. Here's how we make it easier for your team:

- Same-day emergency response until 11:30 PM — no after-hours runaround
- Bulk maintenance pricing when you've got multiple units
- Single vendor, single invoice — keeps your books clean

Would it help to have one reliable garage door company for all your {city} properties? Happy to set up a quick call to go over pricing.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Re: Garage door vendor for your {company_name} properties?
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Just following up — I know property management means a hundred things on your plate at once.

The main reason PMs like working with us is the late-night availability. Tenant calls at 9 PM about a garage door stuck open? We handle it that same night, up to 11:30. Your tenants are happy, you don't have to deal with it the next morning.

We also do quarterly spring and opener checkups if you want to get ahead of the emergency calls altogether.

Worth a quick conversation?

Tal
{phone}

steps.subject: One invoice, all your garage doors handled
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

One more thought for {company_name} — we keep things simple on the billing side. One vendor, one monthly invoice for all garage door work across your portfolio. No chasing multiple contractors or matching receipts.

A few PMs we work with in {county} have us on retainer for their units. Saves them about 30% compared to calling around for one-offs every time.

If that sounds useful, I'm happy to put together a custom quote based on how many properties you manage.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Last note from Tal at Goldman's
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

I won't keep bugging you — just wanted to leave my info in case a garage door issue comes up down the road.

Same-day service, late-night availability, volume pricing for property managers. Save my number and reach out whenever it makes sense for {company_name}.

Hope you're having a smooth month.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

notes: Send from MI number for MI leads, NC number for NC leads. Emphasize emergency response and simplified billing.
